title: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 Day 1: Software Factories & Keynotes
summary: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 held on June 30, 2026 in San Francisco featured keynote sessions and main-stage programming on software factories and related AI engineering topics. The event was livestreamed online and included multiple programming blocks throughout the day at Moscone West.
writeup: This video is the Day 1 stream from AI Engineer World's Fair 2026, held June 30, 2026 at Moscone West in San Francisco, covering keynotes and main-stage programming centered on software factories and related AI engineering topics. It documents the conference's opening day for those tracking how the field frames automated, production-scale software development. The recording spans multiple programming blocks across the day and was originally livestreamed online.
